creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 6 Feb 2008 09:23:50 +0100
"Schumacher, Hardy" <Hardy.Schumacher@amd.com> wrote:

> 
> I've tried starting rtcw and linux-doom3 with latest patches of xorg.
> Both applications did not run. Rtcw started, but when I wanted to start
> a new game it crashed. Linux-doom3 did not start anyway.
> See logfiles attached on this mail.
> 
> Regards,
> Hardy

Hello.

I guess I should have asked you to try this before: do similar but
native applications run (for example games/iourbanterror and
games/openarena)?

If they do I'll ask on the emulation@ list, otherwise I don't know
(have you tried with software OpenGL?). A kernel trace (see ktrace(1))
may reveal more information.

Best Regards,
Ale
